title: bidens basalis
intro: Bidens basalis, also known as the creeping bidens or bidens, is a perennial plant native to Southeast Asia and Australia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bidens basalis include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Bidens basalis can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
